name: TC-NFR-004: Retrieve Order History Performance Test (Read Operation)
description: Verify that the order history endpoint (/api/v1/orders/history) meets performance requirements when executing concurrent POST requests with date-range and status filters to retrieve historical order data.
corresponding_NFR: NFR-4: Retrieve Order History (Read Operation) — average response time ≤ 300 ms, P95 latency ≤ 600 ms, error rate < 0.5%, throughput ≥ 100 requests/sec.
preconditions: Users must have historical order data available in the test database.
The time range specified in each request must include existing orders.
Read-only API — no authentication required, or use static tokens if applicable.

input_data.load_type: Ramp-up to target throughput of ≥ 100 requests/sec

notes: Use parameterized user_id values to simulate realistic read distribution and avoid cache skew. Ensure the test dataset covers the full date range (2024-01-01 to 2024-12-31) with completed orders. Monitor database read replica lag if applicable, as it may inflate response times under high throughput.
